bench_mahler_yum.MahlerYum.peakmem_execu.code:
class MahlerYum:
    def peakmem_execution(self):
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            period_to_regime_to_V_arr=None,
            log_level="off",
        )

    def setup(self):
        self._build()
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            period_to_regime_to_V_arr=None,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._compile_time = time.perf_counter() - start
bench_mahler_yum.MahlerYum.peakmem_execu.name: bench_mahler_yum.MahlerYum.peakmem_execution
